reported.provenance: The calculation was performed using chemkit with DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) in the gas phase on the specified structure. Warnings indicate charge conservation issues during convergence, but the results are reported as is.

prose: The Fukui-reactivity analysis on furan was conducted with chemkit's DFT skill, using the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The most electrophilic and nucleophilic sites are localized on the same carbon atom (atom 5). Large drift warnings suggest partial convergence issues in the N+1 and N−1 states, which may influence the absolute values. All results are based on the specified computational parameters.
